steps.t: Éowyn is standing outside the Mead Hall of Entwade. You should speak to Lady Éowyn and drive the White Hand from Entwade.
Anrad can be found at the gate of Entwade near the Sutcrofts. You have defended the southern flank of Entwade and should now secure the gate.
Síric is in northern Entwade. You have discovered Síric and his men amidst slain White Hand forces. You should speak to Síric.
Éowyn and the others can be found to the west. Éowyn is running toward the western flank of Entwade. You should follow her.
Éowyn can be found inside Entwade in eastern Kingstead. You have repelled the White Hand and brought some measure of peace to the Wade. You should now…
